title: pgx Pooling, Query Contracts, Transactions, and Cancellation · Independent Go Trial
summary: An independent community archive receives a different publisher mix, malformed feed, validator state, tenant, schedule, database condition, accessibility need, platform, and injected failure and transfers pgx pooling, query contracts, transactions, and cancellation into a changed bounded pgx repository and unit-of-work layer. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of bounded pgx repository and unit-of-work layer with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress t…
objectives: Create one bounded pgxpool, verify startup deliberately, observe acquire wait, and close after admission and worker shutdown.
Use parameterized typed queries, explicit columns, row closure, iteration errors, cardinality expectations, and explainable mapping.
Run every unit-of-work statement on one transaction, defer rollback safely, commit once, and preserve the original cause.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Feed aggregation and Go Commit to the mission model · Lab Feed Go Pool Lifecycle
steps.instruction:
lab case — A lab Go team handles case 5180 during a cross-tenant privacy audit. Build deterministic Go evidence to prove pgx pool, rows, one-connection transactions, cancellation, and error ownership; the release claim must bind source, migrations, dependencies, binary, image, configuration, and restored state; then inject one URL, DNS, redirect, compression, entity, depth, timeout, or publisher-budget failure and reject it safely. Browser Go uses pure bounded models and original RSS, Atom, HTTP, PostgreSQL, and reader fixtures only. Real DNS, sockets, XML libraries, PostgreSQL, processes, signals, race, load, containers, accessibility review, backups, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates.

What must be established before implementation?

Evidence target: Feed aggregation and Go Commit to the mission model · Lab Feed Go Pool Lifecycle.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for create one bounded pgxpool, verify startup deliberately, observe acquire wait, and close after admission and worker shutdown.
